cleavage agent: A 1 μl portion of trypsin (Sigma) was added afterward at 37 °C.
enrichment method: Immunoprecipitation pulled down the dTALE protein (Supplementary Fig. 1d) as well as other proteins and complexes that are also attached to that region.
instrument: coupled to an LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo) operating in positive mode
reduction reagent: A 1 μl portion of 100 mmol/l DTT (Sigma) was added.
reduction concentration: A 1 μl portion of 100 mmol/l DTT (Sigma) was added.
